theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (The Modern 'Bahi Khata' Ledger)
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: Shopkeepers need trust, physical familiarity, and clarity. The app relies on a 'Bahi Khata' aesthetic with warm off-whites (paper), deep ink blacks, and high-contrast ledger colors (terracotta red for debt, moss green for paid) instead of cold fintech blues. This makes the digital transition feel grounded and one-handed mobile use less intimidating.

typography.instructions: Avoid centering text unless absolutely necessary. Left-align text for readability, right-align ALL monetary values. Apply 'tabular-nums' utility to all numbers (prices, dates, quantities) to prevent shifting layout during dynamic updates.

color_system.instructions: No generic background gradients. Use solid, flat colors to mimic physical paper ledgers. Status colors are CRITICAL for the business owner's rapid scanning—use them strictly for their meant purpose (Red = Overdue/Delayed, Yellow = Pending/Low Stock, Green = Paid/Delivered).

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Strictly mobile-first (grid-cols-1). Treat the UI as a vertical scrolling stack.
layout_and_spacing.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-4 and p-6 on cards. Padding inside containers must prevent text collision.
layout_and_spacing.borders: rounded-xl for main cards, rounded-lg for buttons and inputs. Use crisp 1px solid borders (border-[#E5E1D8]) to separate elements rather than relying on muddy drop-shadows.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Minimal. Use shadow-sm for floating actions or bottom nav, otherwise rely on borders for flat tactile separation.
layout_and_spacing.touch_targets: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, selects, inputs) MUST have a minimum height of 48px (h-12) or 56px (h-14) for one-handed shop use.

components.buttons: Full width on mobile layout. h-14 height. Use pure Tailwind for layout containers.
components.inputs_and_forms: Minimize typing: favor Shadcn UI Select, Radios, and DatePickers over raw text inputs. Override Shadcn default heights to h-14 for all form fields.
components.cards: Use flat surfaces with border-[#E5E1D8] and rounded-xl. Do NOT use the default Shadcn Card if it feels too 'SaaS'. Strip out shadows for the organic ledger vibe.
components.navigation: Implement a Fixed Bottom Navigation Bar on mobile for core tabs (Home, Directory, Orders, Payments). Use a Sticky Header for context, back buttons, and the Hindi/English toggle.
components.data_display: Tables are hard on mobile. Use 'List Items' with Flexbox (Title/Date on Left, Status/Amount on Right) inside cards instead of wide HTML tables.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Subtle background shifts (e.g., bg-stone-50 on hover).
motion_and_interaction.active_states: Buttons must have an active:scale-[0.98] to give tactile physical feedback when tapped.
motion_and_interaction.transitions: Use quick, simple slide-up (translate-y) animations for drawers/dialogs. Avoid slow fades.

image_urls.description: Blurred grocery store shelves. Use this as the background image for the Login/Signup screen behind a semi-transparent glass or solid card.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide React for all iconography. Keep stroke-width consistent (typically 2). Use icons heavily in the Bottom Nav and Status badges to reduce reading load.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: CRITICAL: ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, toggles, menu items) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-btn', data-testid='wholesaler-item-1').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on brand background passes APCA/WCAG. Provide clear visual distinction for focused inputs (focus:ring-2).

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application as a mobile-first PWA-style interface optimized for one-handed portrait mode.
Implement a Bottom Navigation Bar for rapid switching between: Home, Wholesalers, Orders, Payments.
Persist a global Hindi/English language toggle button in the top Sticky Header.
Enforce DD/MM/YYYY date formatting and INR (₹) formatting for all prices and totals universally.
Ensure the 'Low Stock & Reorder' section exists on the Home dashboard or a dedicated view.
Override all Shadcn UI default control heights (buttons, selects, inputs) to be h-14 to ensure large tap targets.
Populate the app with extensive sample/demo data to immediately demonstrate the value of tracking orders, tracking payments, and viewing price comparisons.
Ensure the layout strictly follows the Organic 'Bahi Khata' color theme from this JSON.
